items.caption: A diagram illustrating the impact of broken lines on mooring line design. two sets of lines are shown, one with a solid line and the other with a dashed line. the solid line represents a continuous line, while the dashed line represents a broken line. the broken line is shown with a green box indicating the point of the break. the diagram also includes text that explains the concept, stating that broken lines have a significant impact on the design of mooring lines, as adjacent lines must pick up loads and resist dynamic response induced by the broken line.
